reason: The sample demonstrates strong quality across all layers. The assistant correctly used tools for markup and discount calculations, and when the future_value tools returned clearly erroneous results (e.g., $50,000 at 6% for 5 years showing $840 million instead of ~$67,000), the assistant properly identified the bug and provided accurate manual calculations. The user behaves as a realistic sales executive with natural follow-up questions and no tool-name jargon. The blueprint goals are coherent and the trajectory meaningfully reflects all four intended goals. The only minor note is that the final turn used no tool calls (assistant computed manually), but this was appropriate given the tool malfunction and the assistant still provided correct results. No deductions warranted as the sample is highly useful for dataset purposes.
